title: Preparation of tissue punches of SNpc for the analyses of mitochondrial function
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"6pmeb","text":"Protocol for the preparation of tissue punches of SNpc for the analyses of mitochondrial function","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"6obhj","text":"This procedure was carried out following the guidelines on the ethical use of animals from the Council Directive of the European Communities (2010/63/EU) and was approved by the Italian Ministry of Health","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Dissect the brain and places in ice-cold oxygenated artificial cerebrospinal fluid (aCSF: 120 mM NaCl, 3.5 mM KCl,1.3 CaCl 2 , 1 mM MgCl 2 , 0.4 mM H 2 PO 4 , 5 mM HEPES, 10 mM D-glucose, pH 7.4), saturated with 95% O 2 and 5% CO 2 for 30 minutes
Cut the brain in coronal brain sections (180 µm thickness) with a vibratome (VT1200S, Leica, Nussloch, Germany) in ice-cold aCSF under continuous oxygenation
Collect punches including the SNpc by a reusable biopsy punch (0.35 mm diameter) (World Precision Instrument, FL, USA) by gently pressing on the brain slices
creator: Ada Ledonne
